name: Environment data grouped sorting
definitionOfDone: AMCore User UI generator sorts environment rows by group and key
Credential, Secret, Notion ID, Database ID, LINE, Report, URL, Runtime, and Config values are grouped together
User UI username is shown directly above User UI password
SevenAM User UI is regenerated with grouped environment data
HOZO AM User UI is regenerated with grouped environment data
Project manifests and upgrade records are updated separately
